Prep table with calculated linear associations

Source: R/helpers-prism.R
prep_dt_assoc.Rd

Prep table with calculated linear associations

Usage

prep_dt_assoc(dt_response, dt_depmap, selected_feat_meta_col = NULL)

Arguments

dt_response

data.table with experimental response data (rows are samples) for one metric

dt_depmap

data.table with dependent variables data load from DepMap. (rows are samples, columns are features or meta); outputted by one of prep_dt_depmap_feat or prep_dt_depmap_meta

selected_feat_meta_col

string name of feature/meta column in DepMap

Value

A named list with elements, that may be input to plot_volcano_assoc

  • dt_assoc data.table with calculated association values between feature/meta of DepMap and selected metric,

  • condition_info string describing experiment condition (drugs),

  • selected_feat_meta_col string name of feature/meta.

Author

Janina Smoła janina.smola@contractors.roche.com

On this page
